# ona_warm_pool (List Resource)

Lists importable Ona warm pools.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_warm_pool" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `environment_class_ids` (List of String) Environment class IDs to include.
- `project_ids` (List of String) Project IDs to include.
